feedback: The response was fast and the agent solved my issue clearly.
The product demo was useful, but pricing details were confusing.
The dashboard is slow when I filter large date ranges.
I liked the helpful tone, although I had to repeat my problem twice.
The export failed several times and I could not finish my report.
The new reporting layout makes it much easier to spot trends.
Good service overall, but follow-up emails arrived later than promised.
The knowledge base article was clear and saved me time.
Mobile navigation feels awkward and some labels are hard to understand.
CSV import worked perfectly and reduced manual work for my team.
The issue was fixed, but the ticket status updates were unclear.
I appreciate the cleaner design and faster page loads.
